ValidationRule.description: PO/WO/Signed Quotation is mandatory from Funds (Negotiation) stage onwards.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Funds (Negotiation)'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Advance Paid'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Won') ), ISPICKVAL(PO_WO_Signed_Quotation__c, '') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: PO/WO/Signed Quotation is required from the Funds (Negotiation) stage onwards.
